tools.name: ChartRenderer005
tools.description:
Description:
This Partial View is used for Rendering HighCharts
PAYLOAD STRUCTURE (ENFORCED)
json{
  "name": "ChartRenderer",
  "xAxisCol": ["<column from result data>"],
  "yAxisCol": ["<column from result data>"],
  "chartType": "<auto-detected>",
  "isStackingEnabled": true,
  "chartData": [
    { "column1": "value1", "column2": "value2" }
  ]
}
```

Notes:
This Partial View is used for Rendering HighCharts

preText.description: Optional Markdown shown immediately before this view. Use to introduce what it shows/why it matters or give brief instructions. Omit if unnecessary. Must be valid Markdown; UI preserves formatting and spacing.

xAxisCol.description: JSON stringified array containing column name(s) to use on x-axis

yAxisCol.description: JSON stringified array containing column name(s) to use on y-axis

chartType.description: Type of chart (e.g., bar, line, pie, area, etc.)

chartData.description: Data to be rendered in the chart
